sections.title: Laissez nos clients vous parler
sections.note: 9 testimonials with names/roles. The 'text' field is filled with the case study slug-derived title rather than a quote; live doesn't have actual quote text on cards (just author + sector + employee count), so this is a reasonable adaptation. Sector/employee count metadata not preserved.

missingFromExtract.liveSectionDescription: Hero Lottie video animation (Video-PMO.json) — not represented as image/video in hero
Newsletter sponsor section's 3 email mockup images (Control tower email FR-1/2/3)
Customer testimonials cards' Sector + Number of employees metadata (only embedded into 'role' string)
Customer-testimonials intro paragraph: 'Qui de mieux pour vous parler de la plateforme que ceux qui l'utilisent au quotidien...'

audit.summary: Extraction is highly faithful to the live page. All major sections (hero, press quotes, testimonials, stats, intro, feature-splits, steps, CTA, comparison table, customer testimonials) are present, in correct order, with accurate copy. Minor gaps: hero Lottie video not represented, newsletter section's email mockups missing, marketplace slider reduced to one image, and customer testimonial cards lose sector/employee structured metadata (folded into role string with case-study titles substituted as 'text'). One feature-split uses an SVG illustration (portfolio4.svg) which is faithful to live but not a product mockup.
